isolation.boundary: API origin only; no app, database, auth, or invite mutation

assertions.title: API health boots without Polar blocking runtime

steps.action: Run curl against the assigned API health surface
steps.expected: HTTP 200 response proving the API is up without requiring Polar configuration
steps.observed: curl -sS -i --max-time 10 http://api.faworra.localhost:1355/ returned HTTP/1.1 200 OK with body OK

summary: Tested 1 assertion: VAL-RUNTIME-001 passed. The assigned API origin returned HTTP 200 OK with body OK on the health surface.
